description: shadcn-ui major feature release - 5 domains across ui/docs/ci/config/api
rationale: Component files = ui (117k lines). README/docs = docs (105 lines). Workflows = ci (40 lines). package.json = config (173k lines). API routes = api (5k lines). 5 domains = ERROR.
notes: Very large release PR. Legitimate multi-domain detection.
